states.label: Idle
states.description: Companion is awake, calm, and available.

states.label: Thinking
states.description: Hermes is planning, reasoning, or preparing a response.

states.label: Working
states.description: Hermes is executing a tool, command, workflow, or task.

states.label: Success
states.description: Hermes completed a task or made useful progress.

states.label: Blocked
states.description: Hermes needs approval, clarification, permissions, or a safety pause.

states.label: Error
states.description: A command, workflow, or integration failed.

states.label: Sleeping
states.description: Companion is offline or not currently watching Hermes.

states.label: Reminding
states.description: Hermes is surfacing a reminder, check-in, or scheduled follow-up.

states.label: Learning
states.description: Hermes is discovering, creating, refining, or installing a skill.

states.label: Recalling
states.description: Hermes is using memory, summaries, context, or prior decisions.

companions.name: Koda
companions.shortBio: Koda keeps the active goal in view, nudging Hermes and the user when work drifts, stalls, or needs a clear next step.
companions.visualDescription: Humanoid robot wolf/dog goal guardian with dark gunmetal armor, tall angular ears, amber eyes, an amber chest core, compact heroic proportions, clawed feet, and small blue LED accents.

canonicalDesignNotes: Dark gunmetal humanoid robot wolf/dog with oversized expressive head and alert ears.
Amber eyes and circular amber chest core should remain the main read at small desktop sizes.
Blue accent lights are secondary and should not overpower the goal-guardian amber.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Koda v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Hermes blocked/error states currently map through the shared overlay fallback states.
Goal drift reminder can use the waving/reminding row until a dedicated goal-guard row exists.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Tracks active /goal progress, reminds the user when a task is blocked or drifting.

companions.name: Miko
companions.shortBio: Miko appears around skill discovery and improvement, making Hermes feel quick, curious, and tactical when new capabilities are found.
companions.visualDescription: Sleek humanoid robot fox skill scout with sharp ears, slim agile armor, orange eyes, an orange chest core, orange and cyan light strips, a segmented tail, and a confident strategic stance.

canonicalDesignNotes: Dark agile humanoid robot fox with sharp ears and a large segmented tail.
Orange eyes and core carry the skill-scout identity, with cyan as a secondary circuit accent.
Keep the stance narrow and quick so Miko feels tactical rather than heavy.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Miko v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Hermes learning/recalling states currently map through the shared review fallback.
Skill discovery can use review or waving until a dedicated skill-scout row exists.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Appears when Hermes discovers, creates, or improves a skill.

companions.name: Bramble
companions.shortBio: Bramble is the companion for long-running work: steady, grounded, and reassuring when a task needs time or recovery.
companions.visualDescription: Larger humanoid robot bear deep-work anchor with rounded dark armor, heavier arms, blue eyes, a blue chest core, bronze claw details, broad feet, and a calm grounded posture.

canonicalDesignNotes: Large rounded humanoid robot bear with soft face proportions and heavy arms.
Blue eyes and core should feel calm and dependable, not aggressive.
Bronze claws and ring details add weight while preserving a friendly deep-work silhouette.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Bramble v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Long-running work can use waiting/running rows depending on whether Hermes is planning or executing.
Recovery and error states currently map through failed and idle fallback behavior.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Focus mode, long-running work, background execution, recovery after failed tasks.

companions.name: Nyx
companions.shortBio: Nyx represents low-noise automation and fast command execution without stealing focus from the user's desktop.
companions.visualDescription: Dark humanoid robot cat/panther stealth automation companion with a smooth shell, violet eyes, a violet chest core, flexible posture, minimal armor, clawed feet, and a quiet segmented tail.

canonicalDesignNotes: Sleek dark humanoid robot cat/panther with smooth armor and purple light language.
Violet eyes and core should be the strongest visual signal.
Tail and posture should communicate quiet automation, not playful mascot behavior.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Nyx v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Silent automation can use running/waiting rows with low-noise Hermes notifications.
Success currently maps through the shared overlay fallback until a dedicated quiet-complete row exists.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Silent automation, background tasks, quick command execution.

companions.name: Pip
companions.shortBio: Pip handles quick nudges, routine check-ins, and lightweight reminders with bright but restrained energy.
companions.visualDescription: Smaller humanoid robot rabbit reminder companion with long mechanical ears, green eyes, a green chest core, spring-like legs, yellow joint accents, friendly expression, and quick upright posture.

canonicalDesignNotes: Small upbeat humanoid robot rabbit with tall mechanical ears and spring-like lower legs.
Green eyes and core make reminders feel fresh and friendly.
Yellow accent joints should stay secondary and support the quick-check-in personality.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Pip v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Reminding maps cleanly to waving for quick check-ins and lightweight nudges.
Future dedicated reminder rows can add ear-perk timing without changing the shared state model.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Reminders, quick check-ins, daily routines, lightweight nudges.

companions.name: Atlas
companions.shortBio: Atlas surfaces memory, context, summaries, and recommendations when Hermes needs to reason from past work.
companions.visualDescription: Humanoid robot owl/eagle memory companion with wing-like shoulder panels, blue eyes, a blue chest core, gold beak and trim, clawed feet, and an observant mentor-like posture.

canonicalDesignNotes: Humanoid robot bird that reads between owl and eagle through eyes, beak, shoulders, and talons.
Blue eyes and core communicate memory/insight while gold trim gives Atlas a mentor signal.
Wing-like shoulder panels should animate for recalling without becoming full wings.

suggestedAnimationNotes: Final Atlas v1 spritesheet includes idle, running-right, running-left, waving, jumping, failed, waiting, running, and review rows.
Recalling and learning currently map through review until dedicated memory-insight rows exist.
Memory summaries can use waiting/review depending on whether Hermes is gathering context or presenting insight.
companions.useCaseInsideHermes: Memory recall, summaries, progress reports, recommendations.
